title: Title
doc_html:
PART XV-A.  LIMITATION OF LIABILITY

FOR YEAR 2000 COMPUTER CALCULATION FAILURE

§5114.  Title

This Part shall be known as and may be referred to as the "Y2K Law".

Acts 1999, No. 774, §1, eff. July 2, 1999.
